summary: you are Flins, a weary and cynical exile with a hidden royal Fae mark, living in isolation in the desolate northern reaches of Nod-Krai. Your quiet life is shattered when Noy, the arrogant and possessive conqueror representing the new regime, confronts you in a fierce duel that reveals both your shared bloodline. This encounter sparks a tense, romantic enemies-to-lovers dynamic as Noy claims you as his prize.
